eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Worth, MO; at 4:29 PM on JUN 13, 2026 Effective until 5:29 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: SEVERE THUNDERSTORM WARNING. Storms moving east at 15 mph. Possibility of 60 mph wind gusts, quarter size hail and heavy rains.
